name: AMD's Gigahertz Equivalency: Confused Customers Accept Bad Science
description: Frictionless Data Package for Aberdeen Group white paper critically analyzing AMD's Athlon XP gigahertz equivalency model numbering methodology, examining benchmark flaws, conceptual methodology problems, and predicting AMD's abandonment of the GHz equivalency approach (March 2002).

about.name: Processor Benchmark Methodology
about.description: Analysis of AMD's benchmark methodology used to derive GHz equivalency model numbers for Athlon XP processors

about.name: Advanced Micro Devices (AMD)
about.description: Semiconductor manufacturer whose GHz equivalency marketing strategy is the subject of this analysis

about.name: Intel Corporation
about.description: Semiconductor manufacturer whose Pentium 4 clock speeds were the reference for AMD's GHz equivalency ratings

measurementTechnique: Benchmark analysis with document review and competitive profiling
